mapper.select: SELECT b.building_name AS buildingName, COUNT(r.id) AS repairCount FROM biz_repair_order r INNER JOIN dorm_room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id INNER JOIN dorm_building b ON rm.building_id = b.id WHERE r.del_flag = '0' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND r.status != 3 -- 屏蔽已评价归档的单据 GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY repairCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM biz_repair_order WHERE status = 0 AND del_flag = '0' AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT r.*, b.building_name AS buildingName, rm.room_no AS roomNo, u.real_name AS applicantName, u.phonenumber AS applicantPhone, fa.asset_name AS assetName, ABS(wt.amount) AS materialCost -- 💸 联动财务：穿透流水表获取维修耗材费 FROM biz_repair_order r LEFT JOIN dorm_room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN dorm_building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_ordinary_user u ON r.applicant_id = u.id LEFT JOIN dorm_fixed_asset fa ON r.asset_code = fa.asset_code LEFT JOIN biz_wallet_transaction wt ON r.order_no = wt.biz_no AND wt.trx_type = 4 -- 4: 维修耗材类型 WHERE r.id = #{orderId}
SELECT id FROM biz_repair_order WHERE asset_code = #{assetCode} AND status IN (0, 1, 5) -- 包含待指派、维修中、挂起大修 AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT repairman_id AS repairmanId, COUNT(id) AS totalSolved, -- 累计结案单量 ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS avgRating, -- 平均服务得分 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 OR status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as finishedCount FROM biz_repair_order WHERE repairman_id = #{repairmanId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status IN (2, 3) -- 2:已修复, 3:已评价归档 GROUP BY repairman_id
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_repair_order SET status = 1, repairman_id = #{repairmanId}, assign_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 0 AND del_flag = '0'
